title: WP_PAGE_1544_SUITE_GOVERNANCE_TRANSLATION_2026-06-04.md
text:
# WP Page 1544 Suite Governance Translation - 2026-06-04

## Scope
- Page: `https://www.skinharmony.it/suite-governance-filiera-beauty/`
- WordPress post ID: `1544`
- Languages: `en`, `fr`, `de`, `es`
- Method: SkinHarmony Core Translator REST workflow with Core Codex Connector gate.

## Core / Nyra Gate
- Action type: `publish`
- Verdict: `ALLOWED`
- Risk: `low`
- Owner confirmation: `false`
- Report: `reports/codex-core/codex_core_gate_latest.json`

## Translation Run
- Provider status: OK
- Provider: `openai`
- Model: `gpt-4.1-mini`
- Page strings extracted: `117`
- Batch command: `SH_TRANSLATE_LANGS=en,fr,de,es SH_TRANSLATE_BLOCK_SIZE=10 node scripts/translate_wp_site_stepwise.js 1544`
- Batch report: `reports/wp_site_translation_stepwise_2026-06-04.json`
- Result: `117/117` generated for each target language.

## Review Approval
- `en`: pending count after workflow `0`
- `fr`: pending count after workflow `0`
- `de`: pending count after workflow `0`
- `es`: pending count after workflow `0`

The page bundle endpoint was too heavy for full-language transitions, so FR/DE/ES were approved through `review/approve` in smaller ID batches. This kept the workflow scoped to `object_id=1544` and avoided double transitions.

## Runtime Verification
Sample runtime lookups returned translated text for all languages.

Source:
`Il control plane WordPress che trasforma il sito in un nodo commerciale vivo.`

- EN: `The WordPress control plane that transforms the site into a live commercial node.`
- FR: `Le control plane WordPress qui transforme le site en un nœud commercial vivant.`
- DE: `Die WordPress-Steuerungsebene, die die Website in einen lebendigen kommerziellen Netzknoten verwandelt.`
- ES: `El control plane WordPress que transforma el sitio en un nodo comercial activo.`

Source:
`La filiera beauty non ha bisogno di un altro sito. Ha bisogno di una regia.`

- EN: `The beauty supply chain doesn't need another website. It needs orchestration.`
- FR: `La filière beauté n'a pas besoin d'un autre site. Elle a besoin d'une orchestration.`
- DE: `Die Beauty-Wertschöpfungskette benötigt keine weitere Website. Sie benötigt eine Steuerung.`
- ES: `La cadena de valor beauty no necesita otro sitio. Necesita una orquestación.`

## Public Route Verification
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/en/suite-governance-filiera-beauty/`: `200`
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/fr/suite-governance-filiera-beauty/`: `200`
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/de/suite-governance-filiera-beauty/`: `200`
- `https://www.skinharmony.it/es/suite-governance-filiera-beauty/`: `200`

Checked Italian residuals:
- Italian H1 sample absent on all four public language routes.
- Italian lead sample absent on all four public language routes.

Runtime translation samples were found in public HTML for the tested route content. EN/FR showed one long sentence not matching exact raw string in HTML, likely because public rendering escaped or normalized punctuation, while the Italian source sample was absent and the runtime lookup was correct.

## Boundaries
- Italian source content was not modified.
- No price changes.
- No plugin code changes.
- No tenant, key, checkout, CRM or customer data changes.
